ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team name */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game belongs to */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (win/loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the play belongs to */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., pass, run, punt) */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Formation of the play (e.g., QUADS, QUEENS OPEN) */,
  "personnel" TEXT /* Personnel configuration of the play (e.g., 10, 20) */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., touchdown, interception) */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Down number of the play */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Yards gained or lost on the play */,
  "success" TEXT /* Success of the play (e.g., first down, touchdown, turnover) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_play_type FOREIGN KEY ("play_type") REFERENCES play_types ("play_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_formation FOREIGN KEY ("formation") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_personnel FOREIGN KEY ("personnel") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_types" (
  "play_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play type */,
  "play_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the play type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the play type (e.g., passing, running, special teams) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formations" (
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation */,
  "formation_name" TEXT /* Name of the formation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the formation */,
  "formation_type" TEXT /* Type of the formation (e.g., Shotgun, Under Center) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel configuration */,
  "personnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the personnel configuration */,
  "personnel_type" TEXT /* Type of the personnel configuration (e.g., 11, 12, 21) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience level of the player (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "yards_rushing" INTEGER /* Rushing yards for the player in the game */,
  "yards_receiving" INTEGER /* Receiving yards for the player in the game */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards for the player in the game */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Rushing touchdowns for the player in the game */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Receptions for the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the injury occurred in */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, knee injury) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive, out for season) */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date of the player from injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playbooks" (
  "playbook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playbook */,
  "playbook_name" TEXT /* Name of the playbook */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playbook */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the playbook */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the playbook */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playbook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_plans" (
  "game_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game plan */,
  "game_plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the game plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game plan */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the game plan */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the game plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playbook_plays" (
  "playbook_play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playbook play */,
  "playbook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playbook the play belongs to */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playbook_play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playbook_plays_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playbook_plays_playbook_id FOREIGN KEY ("playbook_id") REFERENCES playbooks ("playbook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_plan_plays" (
  "game_plan_play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game plan play */,
  "game_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game plan the play belongs to */,
  "play_id" INTEGER /* ID of the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_plan_play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_plan_plays_game_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_plan_id") REFERENCES game_plans ("game_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_plan_plays_play_id FOREIGN KEY ("play_id") REFERENCES plays ("play_id")
)
